creator: will@physics.purdue.edu
text:
On Wed, Sep 13, 2000 at 04:10:50AM -0000, trost@cloud.rain.com wrote:
> >Synopsis:       lsof port fails if $(CC) has a space in it in /etc/make.conf

Not specific to lsof port.

> 	/etc/make.conf contains the line
> 
> 		CC = cc -pipe

-pipe goes in CFLAGS, not CC.  Nevertheless, CC should probably be fully
quoted anyway.

-- 
Will Andrews <will@physics.purdue.edu> <will@FreeBSD.org>
